use_cases: FAQ sections where users need to expand/collapse answers
Organizing lengthy content like product descriptions or documentation
Filtering or categorization of content lists
ai_summary: A versatile accordion component built on Radix UI with multiple visual variants (outline, solid, default) and configurable indicators (arrow, plus, none). Features smooth CSS animations for expand/collapse transitions and uses class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Ideal for SaaS applications, e-commerce sites, and educational platforms needing collapsible content sections for FAQs, documentation, or settings.
